scenarios.description: TestMinimumReplacementCacheState ingests fixture-like source graphs into the real in-memory SQLite cache store, searches for backlog, lists ready tasks, retrieves DOC-123, resolves aliases/backlinks, and reads sync status without network access.

The focused cache scenario asserts the Day 7 visible state through Store calls and stable-id link rows, while the composition command reruns backlink and identity tests to fail regressions toward shell-readable markdown indexes as backlink keys.
The broader short suite is executed so the minimum replacement cache scenario participates in current-source offline Day 7 walkthrough evidence.

decommission_checks.description: Replaces the legacy shell-readable markdown index route for the minimum Day 7 walkthrough with executable cache-table reads after ingest-like UpsertSourceGraph calls.
decommission_checks.test: TestMinimumReplacementCacheState asserts links target stable id DOC-123 and reads search/list/get/resolve/backlinks/sync-status through Store APIs.

notes.offline: Validation uses local Go commands and in-memory SQLite/cache test state only; live GitCode network and device validation remain disabled.
notes.target_product_path: The run script exercises production cache behavior through Go tests that call the real Store implementation rather than grep-only checks or documentation inventory.
notes.failure_behavior: If ingest-like graph upsert, search, ready task listing, source retrieval, alias resolution, stable-id backlinks, sync status, or short-suite inclusion is missing or path-index-dependent, the cache tests or this run script fail non-zero.
